# Prometheus Strategies

> Prometheus Strategies is a quantitative trading firm specializing in prediction markets. The firm applies quantitative research and proprietary technology to exchange-listed contracts on the outcomes of real-world events, in sports and beyond. Also known as Prometheus Quant.

## About the firm

Prometheus Strategies (Prometheus Strategies L.L.C.) is a quantitative trading firm built around prediction markets, a class of contracts listed on CFTC-regulated exchanges that settle on the outcomes of real-world events. The firm develops systematic approaches, builds its research, pricing, and execution technology in-house, and applies what works across markets.

The firm's name comes from Prometheus, whose name means forethought. For a firm in the business of pricing future outcomes, the name reflects the work.

## How the firm works

- Research driven: every view begins with data. Models are built, tested against outcomes, and revised as the evidence changes.
- Priced in probabilities: prediction markets trade in probabilities, and reasoning under uncertainty is the core of the job.
- Deliberately selective: not every market is worth trading. Positions are chosen carefully.
- Built to improve: results feed back into research, and every settled market improves the next model.

## People

Prometheus Strategies is led by four partners who met at Indiana University's Kelley School of Business:

- Sean Thomas, Partner: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sean-thomas2027/
- Shane McDermott, Partner: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shanehmcdermott/
- Bryce Lesinski, Partner: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bryce-lesinski/
- Andrew Wu, Partner: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrew-wu-5145a1228/
